completed_sprints.name: Sprint 1 — Consolidate & Ship
completed_sprints.notes: 153 tests, structured logging, benchmarks, merged to main

completed_sprints.name: Sprint 2 — Docker Architecture (Pi5)
completed_sprints.notes: 204 domains in 8.5 min (9x improvement). Subfinder batch enrichment, local CT database, observability stack. 217 tests. API deferred to Sprint 3.

milestones.name: Full Vejle run on Docker (Sprint 2, Increment 2.5)
milestones.notes: 204 domains, 203 completed, 8.5 min total, 100% cache hit rate. API deferred to Sprint 3.

milestones.name: Consent management + Valdí Level 1 (Sprint 3, Increment 3.1)

milestones.name: Level 1 scan types (Sprint 3, Increment 3.2)
milestones.notes: WPScan, CMSeek, Nuclei. Requires consent management.
